headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录281篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究192篇, 开源项目47篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（60篇）。其中18%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ citrolabs /ego-lite：The best browser for both you and your AI agents work in parallel.

▸ diegosouzapw /OmniRoute：Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 290+ providers (90+ free), 500+ models — Kimi,

▸ ComposioHQ /awesome-claude-skills：A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows

▸ earthtojake /text-to-cad：A collection of agent skills for CAD, robotics and hardware design
text: 今日共收录281篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究192篇, 开源项目47篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（60篇）。其中18%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
